privileged_info_summary: All three Super PAC committee IDs are verified as real FEC-registered committees: Make America Great Again Inc (C00825851), Future Forward USA PAC (C00669259), and Senate Leadership Fund (C00571703). For the 2023-2024 election cycle, Make America Great Again Inc raised $410.5M with $376.9M in independent expenditures; Future Forward USA PAC raised $559.3M with $517.4M in independent expenditures; and Senate Leadership Fund raised $298.9M with $211.1M in independent expenditures. All three committees significantly exceed the financial thresholds specified in the task metadata (receipts minimum $50M, expenditures minimum $10M, cash minimum $1M). Make America Great Again Inc was reported to hold $196.1M in cash at one reporting period and $304M at the end of 2025. The data source is the Federal Election Commission's official campaign finance database for the 2023-2024 election cycle.
